title: Evac suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''Evac suit''' was a [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]] worn when evacuating a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] in [[Realspace/Legends|space]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Infiltration (adventure)|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}} {{1st}} {{ID|EVAC suit}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''
